seoTitle: Winston Hills vs Winton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Winston Hills and Winton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Winston Hills vs Winton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Winston Hills and Winton.
heading: Winston Hills vs Winton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Winston Hills, New South Wales and Winton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Winton has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Winston Hills (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Winston Hills or Winton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Winston Hills has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Winton scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Winston Hills scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Winton scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Winston Hills or Winton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Winton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
